description:
**Milestone:** Project Artifact Persistence

TDD phase. Create apps/server/src/services/project-artifact-service.ts. Write unit tests first: (1) saveArtifact(projectPath, slug, type, content) writes to .automaker/projects/{slug}/artifacts/{type}/{timestamp}.json and updates the index. (2) listArtifacts(projectPath, slug, type?) returns index entries. (3) getArtifact(projectPath, slug, artifactId) returns full content. Types: 'ceremony-report', 'changelog', 'escalation', 'standup'. Then implement. Wire into CeremonyService: on completion of retro/project-retro LangGraph flow, call saveArtifact with the ceremony output. Add artifact index type to libs/types.

**Files to Modify:**
- apps/server/src/services/project-artifact-service.ts
- apps/server/src/services/ceremony-service.ts
- libs/types/src/project.ts
- apps/server/tests/unit/services/project-artifact-service.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] ProjectArtifactService saves artifacts to .automaker/projects/{slug}/artifacts/{type}/{timestamp}.json
- [ ] Artifact index file (.automaker/projects/{slug}/artifacts/index.json) maintained on every save
- [ ] CeremonyService persists retro and project-retro reports as ceremony-report artifacts
- [ ] listArtifacts and getArtifact return correct data
- [ ] Unit tests cover save, list, get, and index update
- [ ] Build passes

**Complexity:** medium

**Guardrails:** If this phase involves new or changed behavior, include tests that verify correctness. If this phase adds, removes, or changes a user-facing feature, API endpoint, configuration option, or service, update the relevant documentation in `docs/` to reflect those changes.
title: Artifact storage service + ceremony report persistence

summary:
## Summary: Milestone: Project Artifact Persistence

### Changes Implemented
No new code changes were needed â€” all four target files were already fully implemented in prior commits on this branch:

1. **`apps/server/src/services/project-artifact-service.ts`** â€” Already implements `ProjectArtifactService` with `saveArtifact`, `listArtifacts`, and `getArtifact`. Artifacts written to `.automaker/projects/{slug}/artifacts/{type}/{id}.json`. Index maintained at `.automaker/projects/{slug}/artifacts/index.json`.

2. **`apps/server/src/services/ceremony-service.ts`** â€” Already imports `projectArtifactService` and calls `saveArtifact` for both `milestone_retro` (in `handleMilestoneCompleted`) and `project_retro` (in `handleProjectCompleted`).

3. **`libs/types/src/project.ts`** â€” Already exports `ArtifactType`, `ArtifactIndexEntry`, `ArtifactIndex`, and `ProjectArtifact` types.

4. **`apps/server/tests/unit/services/project-artifact-service.test.ts`** â€” Already exists with 11 comprehensive tests covering `saveArtifact`, `listArtifacts`, `getArtifact`, and index management.

### Files Modified
- None (all work was completed in prior commits: "Artifact storage service + ceremony report persistence" #1923)

### Risks/Blockers Encountered
- None

### Learnings
- This worktree branch (`feature/project-artifact-artifact-storage`) was 52 commits ahead of origin, meaning the implementation was completed in an earlier session. The feature is fully realized.

### Notes for Developer
- All acceptance criteria are met as verified by tests and build.
- The ceremony integration uses a fire-and-forget pattern (`void ...catch(...)`) so artifact save failures don't block ceremony delivery.

### Verification Status
- **Unit tests**: 11/11 passing (`ProjectArtifactService` â€” save, list, get, index update)
- **Build**: 18/18 packages successful (`npm run build:server` exit 0)
- **Git diff**: Working tree clean, no unintended changes
- **Playwright**: Not applicable â€” `ProjectArtifactService` is a pure server-side filesystem service with no UI surface to verify via browser automation.
